title: galium sylvestre var. plebeium
intro: Galium sylvestre var. plebeium, also known as the sweet woodruff, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the family Rubiaceae, characterized by its small white flowers and creeping habit. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, the plant is valued for its carminative and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Galium sylvestre var. plebeium include its ability to calm the nervous system, promote relaxation, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used as a dried herb, tincture, or tea to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
